category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a single entrypoint for multiple SSH endpoints; source_facts.homepage is the official Charmbracelet GitHub repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wishlist; source_facts.homepage and repo point to charmbracelet/wishlist.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/charmbracelet/wishlist, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SSH endpoint routing; source_facts.executables lists wishlist.
